query:
SELECT period, payment_external_id, CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as total_amount, is_bad_debt_row, is_close_row
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND contract_external_id = '10503'
ORDER BY period;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT period, payment_external_id, CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as total_amount, is_bad_debt_row, is_close_row
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND contract_external_id = '10503'
ORDER BY period;
